title: Fix plexus.procedure.chat_messages crash on null sequenceNumber
description: When GraphQL returns a ChatMessage with sequenceNumber=null, _default_procedure_chat_messages in MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py raises TypeError ('<' not supported between instances of 'NoneType' and 'int'). The sort lambda uses dict.get with default 0 but that default only fires when the key is absent, not when the value is None. Fix: coerce None to 0 when sorting and reading sequenceNumber. Surfaced via /lab/console session 9fb23c04-cd3f-4c42-ae7b-58a962a9cc5e during local console chat docs lookup.
